form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into third behind Heza Dirty Dancer at this track over 1780m in a MAIDEN on April 8 at $8.50. Raced better the start before that with a good run when 2nd (Sr1) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 5 m by Taking Stock (2:02.70) in MAIDEN on March 30 at $4.80. One of the primary contenders.

form.formComment: Two-year-old filly by Bettors Delight out of Private Bronski having her first start. Finished third in a trial on April 7 at Albion Park over 1660m. Good type expected to play a leading role.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Fr1) over 2040m at this track, well beaten by Vinnie Nitro (2:30.00) in 4yo+ NR up to 40 on March 26 at $151. Two runs back 5th (Fr1) over 1780m at this track beaten 65 m by Prescott (2:14.00) in MAIDEN on March 18 at $126. Hard to have.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Yielded ground over the concluding stages of the event.
Gave ground over the concluding stages of the event.
Inconvenienced after the start when Ninetysevenchevy broke gait.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr3) over 1780m after showing early pace at this track beaten 45 m by Serenus (2:13.10) in MAIDEN on April 12 at $16. Two runs back 5th (Fr1) over 1780m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 8 m by Magic Jujon (2:12.80) in 3yo+ No NR on April 2 at $81. Place best.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Sr4) over 1850m at Marburg beaten 24 m by Bettor Be Bodhi (2:21.10) in 3yo+ No NR on April 5 at $126. Two runs back 8th (Fr2) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 21 m by Taking Stock (2:02.70) in MAIDEN on March 30 at $17. This looks a far sterner test.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced greenly throughout. Contacted a marker post near the 500m.

form.formComment: Finding that maiden win elusive. Last start 7th (Sr3) over 1780m at this track, beaten 35 m by Heza Dirty Dancer (2:10.40) in MAIDEN on April 8 at $3.60. The run previous 8th (Sr1) over 1780m at this track beaten 30 m by Dont Ask Again (2:11.50) in MAIDEN on April 1 at $5.50. Capable of a better showing.

form.formComment: Three-year-old colt by Tintin In America out of Promise Me Robin having his first start. Finished second in a trial on March 26 at Redcliffe over 1780m. Not far away in a recent trial and looks set for a positive start to his career.
